mnemonics.title: File Modes
mnemonics.content: R-W-A+ (Read/Write/Append with Plus): "Read With Attention" - r for read, w for write, a for append, + for update mode

mnemonics.title: Error Checking
mnemonics.content: FEAR: Fopen check, Error handling, Always close files, Rewind when needed

acronyms.usage: Used in FILE pointer declarations for stream handling

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a water pipe connecting program to disk. fopen() opens valve, fclose() shuts it.

analogies.analogy: Like a bookmark in a book - tracks current position for read/write operations
